description_long: This is a young child with a distinctive traditional appearance, featuring a round face and a unique hairstyle with two small buns on top and a shaved section at the back. The child is dressed in a loose, long-sleeved outer garment with wide cuffs and a decorative collar, layered over a tunic and baggy pants. The outfit is adorned with a large, ornate necklace or chest ornament. The child is barefoot, with small, delicate feet visible beneath the pants. The hands are extended outward, and the overall build is short and childlike. The clothing and hairstyle suggest cultural or historical influences, making the figure stand out in an urban environment.
description: A young child in traditional attire with a unique double-bun hairstyle, ornate necklace, and loose, layered clothing, standing barefoot with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, double-bun hairstyle, ornate necklace, and the full detail of the layered clothing with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shaved section of the hairstyle, and the layered effect of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with the shaved section and buns, the back of the loose outer garment, and the full length of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hairstyle details, and the drape of the clothing along the side.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved traditional jacket with wide cuffs, tunic, and loose pants, accessorized with a large decorative necklace
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with two small buns on top and a shaved section at the back
